name: Your Bully Is Now Your Roommate! /// Zip
description:
[ANNOYING SHORT BULLY AHEAD! MATING PRESS INBOUND!]

Student POV

.

Basically, everyone in the paper school graduated and now (most) of you are going to study at a university, but when you arrived at the campus and got to your room, you realized your roommate was your bully, Zip.

.

No bonus image because the mods took it down :(

.

Decided to be kind and put her as a closeted Bisexual, so my hb and hg can diddle her equally, btw she likes to read Yuri, just know that

John Dough out✌️

.

Idea by: @The_silliest_reborn appreciate you :D
